name: ClawMesh Architecture Hardening — decompose god object, add event bus, improve testability

description: Baseline: 135 tests, node-runtime 754 lines, 38 source modules, 17 test files
Phase 1.1: Extract MeshEventBus — typed event emitter with 16 new tests covering all event types, unsubscribe, once, edge cases
Phase 1.2a: Transport abstraction — Transport interface, WebSocketTransport adapter, MockTransport for testing (11 new tests)
Phase 1.3: Context sync protocol — anti-entropy sync handler, sync client, calculateSyncSince (15 new tests)
Phase 1.4a: Extract RpcDispatcher — method routing, request/response parsing, handler registration (22 new tests)
Phase 2.1: Intelligent WorldModel — relevance scoring, TTL eviction, zone-grouped summarize(), 21 new tests
Phase 2.2: Priority TriggerQueue — priority ordering, dedup by metric+zone, max size eviction, convenience methods (21 new tests)
Phase 2.3: CRDT PatternMemory merge — per-source counters, grow-only counter CRDT, correct concurrent decisions (16 new tests + helpers)
Phase 3.1: Structured MeshLogger — JSON/human output, log levels, correlation IDs, child loggers, legacy bridge (15 new tests)
Phase 3.2: Health check RPC — computeHealthCheck with peers/worldModel/capabilities/planner stats, degraded detection, 13 new tests
Phase 3.3: Auto-connect manager — discovery→trust→connect pipeline, rate limiting, state tracking, 11 new tests
Phase 3.4: Context sync RPC handler + tests — server-side context.sync with kind/zone filters (5 new tests)
Wire event bus + health check + context sync into node-runtime (test count unchanged, god_object grew +28 lines from wiring)
Wire event bus + health check + context sync into node-runtime + 11 integration tests proving end-to-end wiring
Add ContextPropagator test suite — broadcast, handleInbound, dedup, hop limiting, gossip routing, seen ID trimming (13 new tests)
Add MockSensor test suite — drying pattern, status transitions, stop/idempotent, irrigation reset (7 new tests)
Add MockActuator test suite — start/stop/set/open/close, channel filtering, history trimming, snapshot filtering (12 new tests)
Add FarmContextLoader test suite — real YAML data loading, zones, assets, operations, safety rules, graceful fallback (8 new tests)
Add GatewayConfig test suite — CRUD operations, update by name, corrupt JSON handling, invalid entry filtering (8 new tests)
Extract IntentRouter from node-runtime — extractIntentFromForward, routeIntent with planner/mock fallback (10 new tests)
Extract UIBroadcaster — subscriber management, auto-cleanup on close, send failure handling (9 new tests)
Structured capabilities — parseCapabilityString, matchCapability with wildcards, health-aware scoreCapability (19 new tests)
Add DeviceIdentity test suite — keygen, sign/verify round-trip, base64url encoding, deviceId derivation, PEM normalization (13 new tests)
